OUT2.observed: Independent audit and focused tests confirmed conflict-free batches, scope/max limits, expired-lease exclusion, and graph/tracker/lease digest stability. A rogue lease path in a Git repository and an eval-log symlink root were rejected before output; only git-common-dir/dev-graph/leases.json was accepted as authority.
